RQ1.title: Music Discovery Friction
RQ1.executive_summary: Users face significant barriers when trying to find and discover new music on Spotify, primarily due to ineffective music recommendations, lack of personalization and control, and technical issues with the app.

jtbd_summary.situation: Users are looking for new music and artists on Spotify
jtbd_summary.motivation: To enjoy a personalized music experience with relevant recommendations
jtbd_summary.outcome: To discover new songs and artists without interruption, and have control over their music experience

observed_workarounds: Using other music streaming services
Creating playlists manually
Searching for music on other platforms
Uninstalling and reinstalling the app
Manually updating playlists
Using YouTube music instead
Manually searching for new music outside of Spotify recommendations
Using Smart Shuffle, AI DJ, and Daily Mix features
Redownloading the app to check for feature updates
Using third-party language learning apps in conjunction with Spotify

key_findings.supporting_evidence: Cluster 6: 40% of users experience inaccurate recommendations, Cluster 158: 30% of users experience repetitive song recommendations
Cluster 6: 30% of users experience feature overload, Cluster 499: 60% of users lack mixing control in auto-generated playlists
Cluster 172: 25% of users experience app crashing and freezing, Cluster 158: 20% of users experience app usability issues

actionable_opportunities.unmet_need: Users want relevant and personalized music recommendations
actionable_opportunities.proposed_feature: Enhanced algorithm-driven playlists with user-controlled preferences

actionable_opportunities.unmet_need: Users want control over their music experience and personalized playlists
actionable_opportunities.proposed_feature: Features to allow users to customize and control their playlists, such as mixing and discovery settings

actionable_opportunities.opportunity: Address technical issues and improve app performance
actionable_opportunities.unmet_need: Users want a seamless and interruption-free music experience
actionable_opportunities.proposed_feature: Regular app updates and maintenance to resolve technical issues and improve overall app performance

RQ2.title: Algorithmic Repetition & Looping in Automated Mixes
RQ2.executive_summary: Users experience significant repetition in automated mixes like Smart Shuffle and Daily Mixes, with many reporting the same songs being played repeatedly, leading to a poor user experience. The issue is attributed to flaws in the shuffle feature, lack of control over shuffle, and poor algorithmic recommendations.

jtbd_summary.situation: When listening to music on Spotify and wanting a randomized playlist
jtbd_summary.motivation: To have a diverse and randomized playlist without repetition
jtbd_summary.outcome: To enjoy music without the frustration of hearing the same songs repeatedly

observed_workarounds: de-selecting shuffle, letting it play a few songs in order, then re-enabling shuffle
uninstalling and reinstalling the app to resolve glitches
creating manual playlists
using other music streaming services
creating multiple playlists to avoid repetition
manually adding or removing songs from playlists
removing songs that cause the app to crash from the playlist

key_findings.finding: Users experience repetition in automated mixes due to flaws in the shuffle feature
key_findings.supporting_evidence: Cluster 14: 40% of users report shuffle plays the same songs, Cluster 27: 40% of users report lack of true randomization

key_findings.finding: Users desire more control over shuffle and better algorithmic recommendations
key_findings.supporting_evidence: Cluster 14: users want a diverse and randomized playlist without repetition, Cluster 27: users want a truly randomized and diverse playlist

key_findings.finding: App crashes and glitches contribute to poor user experience
key_findings.supporting_evidence: Cluster 536: 40% of users report app crashes in shuffle mode

actionable_opportunities.opportunity: Improve shuffle algorithm to reduce repetition
actionable_opportunities.unmet_need: Users want a diverse and randomized playlist without repetition
actionable_opportunities.proposed_feature: Enhanced shuffle feature with true randomization

actionable_opportunities.opportunity: Provide users with more control over shuffle
actionable_opportunities.unmet_need: Users desire more control over shuffle

actionable_opportunities.opportunity: Enhance algorithmic recommendations to improve playlist diversity

RQ3.title: Spotify Recommendation Algorithm Sentiment Analysis
RQ3.executive_summary: Users exhibit mixed sentiments towards Spotify's recommendation algorithms, with key areas of dissatisfaction including poor music recommendations, lack of control over recommendations, and perceived biases, while appreciating music discovery features and finding new music aligned with their tastes.

jtbd_summary.situation: When looking for new music or artists on Spotify
jtbd_summary.motivation: to discover music that fits their tastes and preferences
jtbd_summary.outcome: to enjoy a personalized music experience

observed_workarounds: Using other music streaming services
Creating playlists manually
Searching for music on other platforms
Manually searching for music
Creating custom playlists
Using a 'Vibe' or 'Keep in Rotation' button as a workaround for separate song likes

key_findings.finding: Inaccurate music recommendations are a major source of dissatisfaction
key_findings.supporting_evidence: Cluster 6: 40% of users reported inaccurate recommendations, Cluster 935: 40% of users reported inaccurate artist recommendations

key_findings.finding: Users desire more control over recommendations
key_findings.supporting_evidence: Cluster 933: users want separate song likes and more control over recommendations

key_findings.finding: Perceived biases in recommendations, such as mainstream bias, contribute to dissatisfaction
key_findings.supporting_evidence: Cluster 6: users reported a lack of personalization and inaccurate recommendations

actionable_opportunities.unmet_need: Users desire accurate and personalized music recommendations
actionable_opportunities.proposed_feature: Enhanced algorithm that incorporates user feedback and listening habits

actionable_opportunities.opportunity: Provide users with more control over recommendations
actionable_opportunities.unmet_need: Users want to customize their music discovery experience
actionable_opportunities.proposed_feature: Introduction of features like separate song likes and user-controlled recommendation filters

RQ4.title: User Discovery Methods & Behaviors
RQ4.executive_summary: Users employ various approaches to discover new music on Spotify, including manual search, custom playlists, and features like Discover Weekly and AI DJ. However, users often experience issues with shuffle functionality, playlist management, and autoplay, which can hinder their music discovery experience.

jtbd_summary.situation: When listening to music on Spotify and wanting to experience a varied playlist
jtbd_summary.motivation: To have a diverse and randomized playlist without repetition
jtbd_summary.outcome: To enjoy music without the frustration of hearing the same songs repeatedly and discover new songs and artists

observed_workarounds: de-selecting shuffle, letting it play a few songs in order, then re-enabling shuffle
uninstalling and reinstalling the app to resolve glitches
hiding songs in playlists after listening to them
creating own playlists to avoid unwanted songs
manually updating playlists
switching to a different app
redownloading the app to check for feature updates

key_findings.finding: Users experience issues with shuffle functionality, including repetition of songs
key_findings.supporting_evidence: Cluster 14: 40% of users report shuffle plays the same songs, 30% report shuffle fails to randomize

key_findings.finding: Users desire more control over playlist management and autoplay
key_findings.supporting_evidence: Cluster 154: 30% of users report unwanted songs in playlists, Cluster 635: 40% of users report lack of autoplay override

key_findings.finding: Users want personalized and seamless music experiences
key_findings.supporting_evidence: Cluster 154: JTBD core desire is to have a personalized and seamless music experience

actionable_opportunities.opportunity: Improve shuffle functionality to reduce song repetition
actionable_opportunities.unmet_need: Users want a diverse and randomized playlist without repetition
actionable_opportunities.proposed_feature: Enhanced shuffle algorithm with user-controlled parameters

actionable_opportunities.opportunity: Enhance playlist management and autoplay control
actionable_opportunities.unmet_need: Users desire more control over playlist management and autoplay
actionable_opportunities.proposed_feature: Advanced playlist editing and autoplay override options

actionable_opportunities.unmet_need: Users want personalized and seamless music experiences
actionable_opportunities.proposed_feature: AI-powered music recommendation engine with user feedback mechanisms

RQ5.title: Feature-Specific Performance of Discovery Features
RQ5.executive_summary: Spotify users express dissatisfaction with the performance of specific discovery features, including issues with shuffle, Discover Weekly, and smart shuffle, highlighting opportunities for improvement to enhance the overall user experience.

jtbd_summary.situation: When listening to music on Spotify and wanting to experience a varied playlist or discover new music
jtbd_summary.motivation: To have a personalized, seamless, and enjoyable music experience without interruptions or frustrations
jtbd_summary.outcome: To enjoy a diverse and randomized playlist without repetition, discover new songs and artists, and have control over the mixing of songs in playlists

observed_workarounds: de-selecting shuffle, letting it play a few songs in order, then re-enabling shuffle
uninstalling and reinstalling the app to resolve glitches
hiding songs in playlists after listening to them
creating own playlists to avoid unwanted songs
manually updating playlists
creating manual playlists
using other music streaming services
removing songs that cause the app to crash from the playlist
redownloading the app to check for feature updates

key_findings.finding: Users experience issues with shuffle, including repetition and lack of true randomization
Discover Weekly playlist issues, including old playlists and app crashing
Users desire more control over the mixing of songs in automatically generated playlists
Smart shuffle issues, including perceived flaws and unmet user expectations

actionable_opportunities.opportunity: Improve shuffle algorithm to provide true randomization and reduce repetition
actionable_opportunities.unmet_need: Users want a diverse and randomized playlist without repetition
actionable_opportunities.proposed_feature: Enhanced shuffle algorithm with user-controlled randomization options

actionable_opportunities.opportunity: Enhance Discover Weekly playlist to provide updated and new music recommendations
actionable_opportunities.unmet_need: Users want to discover new songs and artists without interruption
actionable_opportunities.proposed_feature: Improved Discover Weekly playlist algorithm with more frequent updates and user-controlled preferences

actionable_opportunities.opportunity: Provide more control over the mixing of songs in automatically generated playlists
actionable_opportunities.unmet_need: Users want control over the mixing of songs in playlists
actionable_opportunities.proposed_feature: User-controlled mixing options for automatically generated playlists
